name: The Fool
direct_answer: This is the perfect moment for a new beginning. Don't worry—just take the first step. The outcome is 'very positive'!
flow_reading: This is a time of freedom and open possibilities. Life may flow in unexpected directions, bringing surprising opportunities and lucky moments.
choice_option: This choice will feel like an adventure. Nothing is guaranteed, but it can bring you the greatest freedom and personal growth.

name: The Magician
direct_answer: You already have everything you need. Stop hesitating and take action. The answer is 'Yes'.
flow_reading: A powerful creative energy surrounds you. Your ideas have the potential to become reality right now.
choice_option: Choosing this path allows you to fully express your talents. You will be able to take the lead and shape the situation yourself.

name: The High Priestess
direct_answer: This is not the time to act, but to observe. The answer lies within your intuition. The result is 'neutral / wait and see'.
flow_reading: A quiet and reflective period. While external changes may seem minimal, your intuition and inner wisdom are growing stronger.
choice_option: This choice encourages intellectual and spiritual growth. However, it may also feel emotionally distant or a little lonely.

name: The Empress
direct_answer: Warmth, abundance, and happiness are waiting for you. Both love and prosperity are favorable. The result is 'very positive'!
flow_reading: Things begin to grow and flourish around you. Support from others and nurturing connections will bring joy and comfort.
choice_option: This choice will bring richness and comfort into your life. If you want stability and warmth, this is the right path.

name: The Emperor
direct_answer: Strong determination and responsibility are required. The journey may be demanding, but victory is possible. The result is 'positive (effort required)'.
flow_reading: A period of structure, authority, and leadership. Rational thinking and discipline will help you take control of the situation.
choice_option: This choice places you in a position of power and responsibility. Success is likely, but it comes with greater duties.

name: The Hierophant
direct_answer: Following tradition or expert advice will lead you in the right direction. Trust and integrity are important now. The result is 'positive'.
flow_reading: A stable and supportive flow. Guidance from mentors or recognition within a group or organization may appear.
choice_option: This is a safe and ethical path. If you want security and gradual progress within a system, this is a wise choice.

name: The Lovers
direct_answer: Harmony and joyful connections are approaching. An important choice is in front of you. The result is 'very positive'.
flow_reading: A time of communication, connection, and emotional harmony. Relationships will bring powerful energy into your life.
choice_option: This choice follows your heart. It brings joy and harmony, but remember that choosing one path means letting go of another.

name: The Chariot
direct_answer: Move forward with confidence! Victory is within your reach. The result is 'strongly positive'.
flow_reading: A dynamic and determined flow. Even obstacles can be overcome with strong focus and willpower.
choice_option: This choice may bring quick success. However, the fast pace requires strong concentration and control.

name: Strength
direct_answer: Gentleness can be stronger than force. Handle the situation with patience and compassion. The result is 'positive'.
flow_reading: Inner strength and emotional balance become important. True power comes from patience and calm control.
choice_option: This path requires perseverance. Though it may take time, you will ultimately gain true mastery over the situation.

name: The Hermit
direct_answer: Take a step back and spend time in reflection. The answer already exists within you. The result is 'neutral / reflection'.
flow_reading: A quiet period of introspection and learning. Rather than seeking outside answers, deeper wisdom comes from within.
choice_option: This path may feel lonely at times, but it leads to deep insight and personal wisdom.

name: Wheel of Fortune
direct_answer: The wheel of fortune has begun to turn. Don't miss this opportunity! The result is 'very positive'.
flow_reading: Larger forces of fate are at work. Unexpected shifts or new opportunities may appear suddenly.
choice_option: This choice may open a new chapter in your life. Embrace the change and ride the wave of destiny.

name: Justice
direct_answer: Make decisions based on logic rather than emotion. What you give is what you receive. The result is 'neutral / fair'.
flow_reading: Balance, fairness, and truth are essential now. Important decisions or agreements require careful judgment.
choice_option: This choice is rational and fair. If you want clarity and honesty, this is the right path.

name: The Hanged Man
direct_answer: Do not force movement right now. Changing your perspective will reveal new possibilities. The result is 'pause / patience'.
flow_reading: Although things may feel stuck, this is a period of growth and deeper understanding.
choice_option: This choice may feel frustrating at first, but it leads to profound insight and wisdom.

name: Death
direct_answer: When one door closes, another opens. It is time to let go of the past. The result is 'transformation'.
flow_reading: A powerful wave of change is approaching. Endings make way for important new beginnings.
choice_option: This path requires releasing the past. Though it may feel difficult, it opens the door to a completely new life chapter.

name: Temperance
direct_answer: Blend different elements together. With patience and balance, harmony will come. The result is 'positive (balance)'.
flow_reading: A calm and balanced flow where emotional and rational aspects begin to align.
choice_option: This choice offers peace and stability. It favors cooperation, balance, and gradual solutions.

name: The Devil
direct_answer: Be careful of temptation or unhealthy attachments. Something may be holding you back. The result is 'warning / negative'.
flow_reading: Strong desires or difficult attachments may influence your decisions. Awareness is important now.
choice_option: This option may look attractive but could come with hidden costs. Think carefully before committing.

name: The Tower
direct_answer: Unexpected change may occur. However, it may be necessary to correct the wrong direction.
flow_reading: Old beliefs or structures may collapse. Although shocking, this can lead to a new and more authentic beginning.
choice_option: This path is not stable, but it may become a powerful turning point that breaks old limitations.

name: The Star
direct_answer: The long night is ending and hope is shining through. Your wishes may come true. The result is 'very positive'!
flow_reading: A gentle and healing energy surrounds you. Inspiration and emotional renewal will guide you forward.
choice_option: This choice leads you toward your dreams and true aspirations.

name: The Moon
direct_answer: Things may feel unclear right now. Not all information has been revealed yet. Waiting may be wise.
flow_reading: Emotions and intuition are heightened. Look beyond appearances to understand deeper meanings.
choice_option: This path contains uncertainty. Avoid making decisions based purely on emotion.

name: The Sun
direct_answer: Congratulations! Everything shines brightly and success is likely. This is your moment.
flow_reading: A powerful and joyful flow of energy surrounds you. Hidden talents may finally be recognized.
choice_option: This choice brings happiness, confidence, and clear opportunities ahead.

name: Judgement
direct_answer: Good news or a meaningful reunion may arrive. Your sincerity will be rewarded. The result is 'positive (rebirth)'.
flow_reading: Past efforts begin to pay off. Something that was paused may start moving again.
choice_option: This choice brings new opportunities and encourages you to rise to a higher level.

name: The World
direct_answer: Completion and success are within reach. Your goal will be fulfilled.
flow_reading: A cycle reaches its natural conclusion, bringing harmony between inner peace and external achievement.
choice_option: This choice completes your journey beautifully and prepares you for the next stage.
